summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Star Trek TNG LCARS Enterprise Map feature (Iteration 5). All 8 location hotspots working with real-world mapping, ticket management system fully functional, view modes operational.

ui_bugs.issue: Location hotspots require force click due to SVG animation instability - regular clicks fail because elements are constantly animating
ui_bugs.workaround: Force clicking works perfectly, functionality is not broken

passed_tests: Backend API - 100% success rate (23/23 tests passed)
Login as Captain P works (username: captain, password: engage)
Enterprise page loads via navigation
Enterprise map shows all 8 locations as labeled hotspots on ship
Locations with open tickets show blinking orange/red badges
Exterior view shows starfield background canvas
Cross-section toggle shows internal ship details
Clicking locations opens detail view with tickets (with force click)
Location detail shows ZURUECK ZUR ENTERPRISE button
Location detail shows open ticket count and list
Ticket shows CRITICAL/HIGH/NORMAL/LOW priority labels
START button changes ticket status from offen to in_bearbeitung
ERLEDIGT button changes ticket status to erledigt
NEUES ANLIEGEN button shows create form
Creating a new ticket works perfectly
Back button returns to Enterprise map
/api/locations returns all 8 locations with ticket counts
/api/locations/{id} returns location with tickets
/api/tickets CRUD endpoints work
Dashboard and other pages still work correctly
Hover tooltips work on location hotspots
